# 02.04-level3-manager: Multi-target Level 3 Manager component libraries

## Objective
Add net10.0 target framework to Level 3 manager component libraries.

## Scope
- Piranha.Manager.LocalAuth (core\Piranha.Manager.LocalAuth\Piranha.Manager.LocalAuth.csproj)
- Piranha.Manager.TinyMCE (core\Piranha.Manager.TinyMCE\Piranha.Manager.TinyMCE.csproj)

## Prerequisites
Level 0-2 libraries (02.01-02.03) must be complete

## Done when
Both projects target net8.0;net9.0;net10.0, build successfully
